runTitle: v8.12.18 production targeted QA - healthy filter recheck
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/version reports v8.12.18 with commit dcd012fd0cf7f886b0afd326467eb538786fe149 and GitLab pipeline 2548681561
Cloud Run AI Engine /health reports version 8.12.18
Playwright CLI production AI direct-message recheck for normal-range server list prompt
AI Chat: normal-range server list query still returned generic monitoring-server-health summary instead of healthy-only list
skippedSurfaces: Lowest-load and Advisor prompts: already passed in QA-20260524-0574 and were not rerun to avoid extra live LLM calls.
Standard five-question conversational QA: skipped because this was a single blocker recheck.
Vision real-image QA: skipped per manual-only policy.
Broad route/dashboard/modal packs: skipped because this run validated one AI routing blocker only.

expertAssessments.rationale: The v8.12.18 production recheck reproduced the remaining healthy-filter blocker after deploy.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Deploy the healthy-only intentFrame preservation fix and rerun only this prompt.

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab pipeline 2548681561 succeeded, Vercel version metadata matched v8.12.18, Cloud Run health was ok, and Vercel usage remained normal.

usageChecks.summary: npm run check:usage:vercel PASS. Current billing period effective 15.3081 USD, billed 0.0000 USD; no unexpected billed usage observed.

artifacts.label: v8.12.18 healthy filter recheck evidence
artifacts.note: Single-prompt result, failure judgment, and local follow-up validation.

pendingImprovements.title: Healthy-only server filter should resolve to deterministic inverse filter evidence
pendingImprovements.evidence: Production v8.12.18 recheck asked '현재 정상 범위인 서버 목록 보여줘' and still received generic monitoring-server-health summary with warning server api-was-dc1-01.
pendingImprovements.note: Second local follow-up fix has been implemented and passed AI Engine tests, but it is not deployed yet.

notes: This QA run intentionally records the failed v8.12.18 one-prompt recheck before deploying the second local fix.
Root cause found after the run: upstream server_health intentFrame bypassed message-level healthy-only parsing, so statusFilter healthy-only was lost.
